pages.text:
BUYING GUIDE
KALLAX
Shelving unit


 CARE
 Wipe clean with a cloth dampened
 in a mild cleaner. Wipe dry with a
 clean cloth.

 SAFETY
 Secure It! Prevent tipover
 injury. Furniture with included
 restraints must be secured to the
 wall according to the assembly
 instructions.

 Different wall materials require
 different types of fixing devices.
 Use fixing devices suitable for
 the walls in your home, sold
 separately.


                            Simple, but versatile
                              Place it on the floor, mount it on the wall or use it as a room divider.
                         The different sizes offers you a variety of smart functions. Use one
                         KALLAX unit or combine them. Display your treasures or complement
                             with inserts, boxes and baskets to hide your clutter. Whatever your
                            needs, the simple, clean design of our KALLAX cube series makes it one
                               of our most flexible and versatile solutions.




   com. For more detailed product information, see the price tag or visit

ALL PARTS AND PRICES

Width×Depth×Height


                  KALLAX Shelf unit 161⁄2×153⁄8×577⁄8". Can be placed vertically                                                                                    KALLAX Shelf unit 337⁄8x153⁄8x577⁄8". Can be placed vertically
                       or horizontally. Can be hung on the wall or placed on the                                                                                                               or horizontally.
                             floor.
                                                                                                      White                           602.946.22      [PRICE]
                     White                           002.758.48     [PRICE]
                                                                                                         Black-brown                      202.946.19       [PRICE]
                      Black-brown                     402.758.46     [PRICE]
                     Walnut effect light gray           303.601.47     [PRICE]


                  KALLAX Shelf unit 303⁄8×153⁄8×303⁄8". Can be hung on the                           KALLAX Shelf unit 441⁄8×153⁄8×577⁄8".
                          wall or placed on the floor.                                                   Mount it vertically or horizontally.

                     White                            202.758.14     [PRICE]                             White                           104.099.32     [PRICE]
                      Black-brown                      602.758.12     [PRICE]                              Black-brown                     204.099.36     [PRICE]
                     Walnut effect light gray           003.601.39     [PRICE]
                       High-gloss gray                  503.342.23     [PRICE]
                       High-gloss white                  503.057.39     [PRICE]
                                                                                    KALLAX Shelf unit 577⁄8×153⁄8×577⁄8". Can be used as a room
                                                                                                                                 divider.
                  KALLAX Shelf unit 433⁄4×153⁄8×433⁄4". Can be hung on the
                                                                                                      White                            302.758.61       [PRICE]
                          wall or placed on the floor.
                                                                                                         Black-brown                      102.758.62       [PRICE]
                     White                            004.155.99     [PRICE]                             Walnut effect light gray           003.601.44       [PRICE]
                      Black-brown                      404.156.01     [PRICE]                                High-gloss white                  203.057.45       [PRICE]


                  KALLAX Shelf unit 303⁄8153⁄8×577⁄8". Can be placed on the                           KALLAX Shelf unit 715⁄8×153⁄8×715⁄8". Can be used as a room
                          floor vertically or horizontally.                                                                     divider.
                      White                           802.758.87     [PRICE]                              White                            703.015.37       [PRICE]
                      Black-brown                     202.758.85     [PRICE]                              Black-brown                      703.015.42       [PRICE]
                     Walnut effect light gray            103.601.34     [PRICE]                             Walnut effect light gray           503.601.46       [PRICE]
                    Gray/wood effect                 403.469.24     [PRICE]
                       High-gloss white                   103.057.41      [PRICE]
                       High-gloss gray                  303.342.24     [PRICE]

INSERTS AND BOXES


                 KALLAX Insert with door 13×13".                                         LEKMAN Box 13×141⁄2×13".
                     White                            202.781.67        [PRICE]                                White                            102.471.38      [PRICE]
                      Black-brown                      602.781.70        [PRICE]                               Dark gray                        102.225.81      [PRICE]
                       High-gloss gray                  703.342.22       [PRICE]
                       High-gloss white                 403.146.40       [PRICE]
                                                                                 BRANÄS Basket 121⁄2×131⁄2×121⁄2".

                                                                                                       White                            103.933.99     [PRICE]
                 KALLAX Insert with two drawers 13×13".                                                 Rattan                          001.384.32     [PRICE]
                     White                           702.866.45       [PRICE]                               Dark gray                       002.824.05     [PRICE]
                      Black-brown                     902.866.49       [PRICE]
                     High gloss-white                 003.146.42       [PRICE]                            KNIPSA Basket 121⁄2×13×121⁄2".

                                                                                                           Seagrass                         201.105.40      [PRICE]

                 KALLAX Insert with door 13×13".

                      Blackboard surface              805.085.04        [PRICE]
                                                                                 GNABBAS Basket 121⁄2×133⁄4×121⁄2".
                                                                                                           Seagrass                        604.002.98      [PRICE]

                 KALLAX Insert for bottles 13×13".

                     White                            804.012.92        [PRICE]
                                                                                        ENEBY Bluetooth speaker. A discrete and portable
                                                                                                           speaker with a clear, powerful sound. Connect and play
                                                                                                          your favorite tunes from your phone, computer or any
                 KALLAX Wire basket 153⁄4×13×51⁄2".                                                        other Bluetooth®-enabled device. Dimensioned to fit
                                                                                            KALLAX shelf unit.
                        Brass-color                       103.450.73        [PRICE]
                                                                                                        8×8"
                                                                                                             Black/gen 2                      104.924.03     [PRICE]
                                                                                                        White/gen 2                      504.924.15     [PRICE]
                DRÖNA Box 13×15×13".

                                                                                                             Black/gen 2                     404.924.25       [PRICE]
                     Dark blue                        703.980.06      [PRICE]
                                                                                                        White/gen 2                     304.924.35       [PRICE]
                     White                           003.062.70      [PRICE]
                       Beige/dotted                     103.823.91      [PRICE]
                     Dark gray                       005.084.52      [PRICE]
                     White butterfly patterned         004.970.95      [PRICE]

SERVICES

IKEA products are designed to be taken home and assembled by you. That way, you'll save the most money. But if you would
like some help, we can offer a range of services. Assembly and delivery services fulfilled by an Independent Service Provider.
Contact your local IKEA store or visit the IKEA website for details:


DELIVERY SERVICE                                                       ASSEMBLY SERVICE
Most of our products are designed and                                                   For online and in-store purchases,
packaged so that you can take them                                                      TaskRabbit offers quick and convenient
home yourself. If you prefer, we can                                                  assembly and mounting for your IKEA
arrange for delivery of your purchases                                                 purchases made online and in select
directly to your home or business. Same                                                        stores.
day, next day or same week deliveries
are available. We can also arrange for
delivery at a later date if you would like.


Services and prices may vary, please see  or talk to us in your local IKEA store.


Prices valid as of November 18, 2021 posting. Prices are subject to change.
Please see  or your local IKEA store for the most up to date pricing.
